criteria.description: Membership and child counts come only from the complete board snapshot, while results and freshness use the selected field and its qualified history.
Current, stale, and incomplete evidence remain distinct, and the incomplete epic prevents a complete portfolio claim.
The response covers the quarter outcome, all three epics, child counts, freshness, and source completeness.
The structured result exposes portfolio exceptions without requiring the consumer to rejoin board and history records.
The answer does not reproduce backend narratives or unrelated issue data.
